title: helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: os.IsExist(err) after os.OpenFile with O_CREATE|O_WRONLY (no O_EXCL) is dead code — OpenFile never returns EEXIST without O_EXCL. Guard should be removed.
Commit subject 'helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath' is missing SubArea segment. Should be 'helm: createFullPath: Fix file descriptor leak'.
FD leak fixed: createFullPath now returns error and closes the file handle internally.
New TestCreateFileIfNotThere covers directory creation, FD release, and idempotence.
